---
title: "bootstrap"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| include: false
Sys.setenv(RETICULATE_PYTHON = "/opt/anaconda3/envs/myenv/bin/python")
library(reticulate)
py_config()
```

```{python}
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
```

```{python}
x = np.linspace(0, 10, 100)
plt.plot(x, np.sin(x))
plt.show()
```
